definition: Workflow is approved and currently being executed by the organization.
scope_note: Only active workflows should be assigned to running process instances.

definition: Workflow is no longer in use and has been moved to historical records.
scope_note: Archived workflows answer CQ5 stale-workflow queries but generate no new instances.

definition: Workflow has been replaced by a newer version and should not be used for new instances.
scope_note: Deprecated workflows may still have in-flight instances; do not archive until all instances close.

definition: Workflow is being authored or reviewed and is not yet in production use.
scope_note: Set this status when the workflow has not completed its initial review cycle.
